overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk nightclub in a video game. The player walks through neon-lit corridors, passes a dressing room with vanity mirrors, and enters a multi-level dance club with crowds of NPCs. The footage features high-quality ray-traced lighting and a futuristic industrial aesthetic.

illuminated advertising screens on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a narrow cyberpunk corridor lined with neon-lit entertainment booths. A single NPC sits in a booth on the right, while cyan neon strips illuminate the ceiling and digital posters cover the left wall.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dressing room with warm yellow lighting, contrasting the previous neon corridor. The room features illuminated vanity mirrors along the back wall, a silver mannequin, and clothing racks. An NPC stands near the mirrors as the camera moves through the space.

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the dressing room into a narrow, dimly lit corridor with purple patterned wallpaper on the right and metal shelving on the left. A green exit sign is visible at the far end, and glass railings on the right reveal views of the club below.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a large, multi-level nightclub with pink and blue neon lighting. The upper level features glass railings overlooking a crowded dance floor below, where a DJ performs on a central stage. NPCs dance and walk around the space, with bar areas and large wall murals visible throughout the industrial-style venue.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a narrow, neon-lit service corridor into the expansive heart of a multi-level cyberpunk nightclub. It begins by moving through a tight hallway lined with cyan neon strips and digital posters, passing a lone figure seated in an entertainment booth. As the camera pushes forward, the cool tones shift abruptly into the warm yellow glow of a dressing room filled with vanity mirrors, clothing racks, and a silver mannequin. The scene then transitions through a dimly lit passage with purple patterned wallpaper and metal shelving, where glass railings first reveal glimpses of the venue below. Finally, the camera emerges into a vast industrial club bathed in pink and blue light, overlooking a crowded dance floor and a central DJ stage surrounded by towering murals.
